annotation_target.structure: Development return — melody settles, peaceful resolution
teaching_goals: the descent from development should feel like an exhale

teaching_notes.note: The descent: controlled, unhurried. The development's tension releases slowly.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 13–16 of Pathetique Sonata, 2nd Movement (Adagio cantabile) (continuation of mm. 9–12), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 13–16 and describe the return to stability.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 13–16.
Measures 13–16 bring a return to stability — the melody settles back from the developmental excursion. The phrase resolves more peacefully. Let me loop mm. 13–16.
Pathetique mvt 2 mm. 13–16: return from development, melody settles, peaceful resolution. Pairs with mm. 9–12.
